name: G2→G3 Zone 1 — Descent from the Rift Wandering Monsters
description: Wandering monster table for Zone 1 (Days 1–2): Still cold, but the glacial terrain is behind you. Frost giant patrols reach this far. Watchful. Check frequency: once per 8 hours of travel, once per 8 hours of rest.

results.text: 1d3 Frost Giants (southern patrol, armed and alert) [PF2e Lvl 9 each]
2d4 Winter Wolves (ranging south from the Rift) [PF2e Lvl 5 each]
1 Frost Giant Sub-Chief (returning from a solo hunting trip; has sealed mail for the Jarl) [PF2e Lvl 10]
1d4 Woolly Mammoths (migrating; not hostile unless cornered) [PF2e Lvl 7 each]
1 Young White Dragon (Jarl's aerial scout) [PF2e Lvl 10]
2d6 Mountain Dwarves (Mror Holds survey team; heading north away from the Rift) [PF2e Lvl 2 each]
1d4 Stone Giants (neutral; passing through; know the Burning Road route) [PF2e Lvl 9 each]
1d3 Crag Linnorms (hunting the col passes) [PF2e Lvl 8 each]
1 Frost Giant Messenger (carrying sealed correspondence toward G3; alone and moving fast) [PF2e Lvl 9]
HAZARD — Ice storm: visibility 5 feet; all ranged attacks impossible; difficult terrain; lasts 1d4 hours
1 Adult White Dragon (the Jarl's primary aerial guardian; patrolling the southern routes) [PF2e Lvl 12]
